risks.risk: reaction dispatch preview could expose raw support data, wallet addresses, secrets, or prompt-unsafe text
risks.mitigation: tests assert safe metadata only and reject raw message, raw payload, wallet address, secret, stdout, stderr, jobs_url, and logs_url exposure

risks.risk: preview endpoint could accidentally enqueue reaction, overlay, or outbox side effects
risks.mitigation: tests assert repository counts remain unchanged and side-effect status remains skipped
